mapper.sql: p2.id, p2.property_id, p.property_code, p2.prospect_code, p2.prospect_name, p2.interest_type, p2.status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM prospect p2 INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = p2.property_id WHERE p2.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(p2.prospect_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(p2.prospect_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(p2.interest_type) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(p2.status) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%')) ORDER BY p2.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prospect p2 WHERE p2.is_deleted = FALSE AND (LOWER(p2.prospect_code) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(p2.prospect_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(p2.interest_type) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%') OR LOWER(p2.status) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{search}), '%'))
SELECT FROM prospect p2 INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = p2.property_id WHERE p2.id = #{id} AND p2.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT FROM prospect p2 INNER JOIN property p ON p.id = p2.property_id WHERE p2.prospect_code = #{prospectCode} AND p2.is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prospect (tenant_id, property_id, prospect_code, prospect_name, interest_type, status) VALUES (1, #{propertyId}, #{prospectCode}, #{prospectName}, #{interestType}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE prospect SET property_id = #{request.propertyId}, prospect_code = #{request.prospectCode}, prospect_name = #{request.prospectName}, interest_type = #{request.interestType}, status = #{request.status}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE prospect SET is_deleted = TRUE, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
